name: Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the boiling water over the 2 cups of 100% Bran and let stand.
2. Cream the shortening and sugar together.
3. Add eggs to the mixture and mix well.
4. Add buttermilk, then the Bran and water mixture.
5. Mix in the Bran Buds and combine all dry ingredients.
6. Fill greased muffin tins about 2/3 full with the batter.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes.
